name: ConvertKit
description: ConvertKit — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Email Marketing.

seo.title: ConvertKit Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete ConvertKit analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. ConvertKit offers custom pricing.
pros: Multi-channel delivery (SMS, email, voice) from one API
cons: Per-message pricing adds up at high send volumes
